problem_solved: Hospital environmental services (EVS) and bed management teams lack real-time visibility into bed turnover status, causing delays in patient admissions and inefficient discharge workflows
solution_description: Bed management software enabling proactive bed turnover by coordinating EVS workflows ahead of EMR discharges. Real-time tracking of dirty bed status, cleaning progress, and ready-for-patient notifications. Data-driven recommendations for continuous performance improvement
notes: Focused on bed turnover optimization. Integrates with EVS workflows. Complements TeleTracking for full bed management. High Varden fit for hospital operations efficiency.
